## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests` passes.
- [ ] `python validation/harness.py --strict` passes.
- [ ] New/changed detection behavior has a labeled fixture in `validation/corpus/`.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies beyond stdlib + PyYAML (or justified below).
- [ ] Analysis stays deterministic; the tool still never executes scanned code.
